site.title: Niney
site.description: Niney · AI Product Manager · Building healthcare AI, writing about the boundary between model and user.

hero.lineB: And I write what I think about them.
hero.lineC: Looking for the boundary that doesn't quite exist — between model and user.

about.label: ABOUT
about.title: About Niney
about.intro: I'm Niney, a ToC product manager with 3+ years building at the intersection of AI and healthcare.
paragraphs: My background is a bit 'mixed' — and that's exactly what I value most. A cross-domain lens lets me read the emotion behind the numbers and find leverage points inside heavy industry constraints.

I believe great products aren't feature piles — they solve real pain at the right moment with the lightest touch. In healthcare, where trust is the highest barrier, I learned to walk the tightrope between compliance and experience, and to respect the user's fear as much as their hope.
These days I'm watching chronic-disease care and patient education, with side curiosity about consumer health and B2C medical services.

beliefs.title: Users don't lie, but they mislead you
beliefs.body: Real needs hide in behavior — not in interviews.

beliefs.title: Crossing fields is resolution, not a deficit
beliefs.body: Having seen other industries, you know which 'conventions' deserve to be broken.

beliefs.title: First duty of a healthcare product: do no harm
beliefs.body: Decide where the boundary is — before chasing growth.

beliefs.title: Good product docs are a form of respect
beliefs.body: For engineers, designers, and your future self.

timeline.desc: Led an LLM consultation assistant from 0 to 1; DAU broke 10k.
Rebuilt the medication-reminder core; D30 retention +18%.
Designed a referral incentive system; +400k new users in a quarter.
200+ in-depth chronic patient interviews; built a user-segmentation model.
Crossed over from a non-traditional background. Wrote my first PRD.
Built the muscle for logic and communication in a different industry.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.body: Work, collaboration, or pure curiosity — all welcome. Usually back within 24 hours.

footer.subscribePrompt: Occasional posts. Drop your email and I'll send them.
